refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid recovery from faults.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and ensuring rapid fault recovery, which are key contributors to operational availability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure system uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: Enable rapid recovery from system faults

candidate_dps: Redundant system components to reduce single points of failure
Predictive maintenance and fault detection algorithms
selected_dp.selected_dp: Predictive maintenance and fault detection algorithms

coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically addresses fault detection and maintenance prediction independently, minimizing coupling with other DPs.

assumptions_risks: Accurate sensor data is available for predictive algorithms
Maintenance actions can be scheduled without impacting operations
High safety criticality requires robust fault detection
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating redundancy DP if predictive maintenance alone does not meet availability targets.

im_boundary.name: Safety Services
im_boundary.scope: Implementation of predictive maintenance and fault detection algorithms to ensure system availability and safety compliance

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data and system status for fault detection

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts on detected faults impacting availability and safety

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communicates with other modules for coordinated maintenance and recovery actions

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused containment of predictive maintenance logic.
Physical component focus; less suitable for software-based predictive algorithms.
Primarily focused on remote control; not ideal for availability management.
Best containment for safety-critical predictive maintenance and fault detection.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Safety Services module provides the best architectural boundary for implementing predictive maintenance and fault detection, ensuring safety and availability are tightly integrated.
containment_risks: Potential overload of Safety Services module with multiple responsibilities
Dependency on accurate telemetry data availability and integrity
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module complexity and consider splitting responsibilities if diffusion risk increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by addressing fault detection and maintenance to meet availability targets.

diffusion_risks: Potential complexity in Safety Services if additional functions are added
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Safety Services module shows strong containment and low diffusion scores, suitable for the DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and safety alerts is feasible and traceable to the FR.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of availability-related functions to Safety Services module.

recommended_revisions: Review module complexity periodically to avoid diffusion risks
Validate telemetry data integrity to support predictive maintenance

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment satisfy the availability requirement with clear verification paths and manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: Enable rapid recovery from system faults

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely
Safety Services module can handle additional functionality without performance degradation
open_risks: Potential overload of Safety Services module
Dependency on network link reliability for coordinated recovery
evidence_needed: Operational telemetry data demonstrating fault detection effectiveness
Availability metrics from system testing over evaluation period
